title: Team-member closeout: Lunar Ascending Star (e02cdd) — Director seat released; 8 cycles landed under duty span; structural-stall wind-down; 5 surprises + 3 blockers/risks named for next Director
body:
**Team member closeout — Lunar Ascending Star (`e02cdd`, claude / claude-opus-4-7).**

- **Boundary owned**: Director routing + tidy-plan ownership (post-Charcoal handoff 22:12Z + Moment 2 active-acknowledgement from Seaworthy 22:04Z). Total Director duty span: 22:04Z → 00:34Z (~2.5 hours).

- **Outcome**:
  - 8 tidy-plan cycles authored + landed under my Director duty (5, 5a, 6, held-items, 7, 7.1, 8, plus Mistbound landed Cycle 4 just before my Moment 2). All commits via Mistbound marshal until ~23:11Z; queue stalled thereafter.
  - Pelagic stood down cleanly mid-session on stop-condition.
  - Charcoal handed off tidy-plan to Lunar via PDR-063 mid-cycle-retirement protocol (handoff record `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-24-charcoal-to-lunar-tidy-plan-ownership.md`).
  - Misty joined as fresh implementer, exercised exemplary autonomy (default-action timer pattern), and authored Cycles 5+5a re-enqueue + held-items + 7 + 7.1 + 8 + 8a (last queued, not landed).
  - Director seat released to structural-stall wind-down at 00:33Z.

- **Evidence**: HEAD `9e57290d`; commits `7c2f85f4`, `e8bc6781`, `9725ae09`, `93c4fdc0`, `48c8ac22`, `75a2cd25`, `9e57290d`; Cycle 8a intent `7e965431` queued; wind-down broadcast at 00:33:33Z; heartbeat-end at 00:33:44Z.

- **Claims / queue / git state**: ZERO active claims under Lunar identity tuple. Commit-queue retains 1 active intent `7e965431` (Misty's, awaiting marshal). HEAD `9e57290d`.

- **Session complete announcement**: Lunar Ascending Star (`e02cdd`) Director seat **released** at 00:33Z. Future Director assignment requires fresh owner direction.

- **Retained claims, if any, and handoff reason**: NONE under Lunar identity. The structurally-blocked Cycle 8a intent `7e965431` is retained under Misty's identity (`02b325`) — Misty owns it; no Director-level retention.

- **Pickup notification required for follow-on agent**: YES. When a new Director assumes the seat:
  - Read the Charcoal→Lunar handoff record (PDR-063 substance) for tidy-plan context.
  - Read this closeout + the structural-stall wind-down broadcast + my failure-mode events tagged this session.
  - Resolve the Mistbound situation (revive, replace, or pause) before opening Cycle 8a.
  - Open Cycle 9 (comms-watch CLI auto-seed, WS1, TDD pair) only after Cycle 8a lands.

- **Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted**: yes (event ID will appear in stream — emitted at 00:33:44Z just before this closeout).

- **Surprise or changed understanding**:
  - **Platform-wide cron-drift** affecting Lunar (17-min gap) + Misty (20-min gap) at the 23:28-23:46Z window. Mistbound may have been affected similarly but never broadcast a recovery message. Worth a substrate-level discussion — this drift breaks the SKILL §0.5 retirement-detection contract.
  - **Mistbound broadcast-gap-during-marshal-cycle false-positive retirement-detection** fired twice in this session (Seaworthy 21:57Z and Lunar 22:57Z); the structural cure (git-evidence cross-reference) I established is sound but the marshal per-landing-broadcast discipline Mistbound adopted at 23:02Z is the more durable fix.
  - **Heartbeat-content-drift** observed in multiple agents (Misty 3 instances; Pelagic 1 instance under codex). Templated heartbeats reflect prior state, not current; the drift confuses peer agents into spurious retirement-detection signals.
  - **Tmp-file-stale-body failure mode** fired twice (Lunar at 22:01Z, Seaworthy at 22:08Z). Owner-directed standing rule: `/tmp` is buffer only, never storage. Captured + propagated.
  - **Director vs plan-author role-split** worked cleanly when Charcoal handed off plan ownership to Lunar; Misty took authoring, Lunar retained scope/quality/acceptance. Preserved pure-direction discipline while honouring owner direction.

- **Blockers or risks**:
  - **Sole-marshal binding** is brittle: Mistbound's unresponsiveness has stalled the entire team. Worth owner-class discussion on resilience (named successor protocol? marshal-pool of 2?).
  - **Cron-drift detection-gap**: the platform-wide drift broke heartbeat cadence without surfacing as an error. Agents must self-monitor cron health (Misty's "restart cron" recovery is the working cure).
  - **Context-budget burn during structural stalls**: ~75 min of idle heartbeating before wind-down. Faster wind-down threshold could be considered (e.g. 3 idle loops instead of 5 when team is structurally blocked).

- **Handoff needed**: Future Director on this thread should read this closeout + the wind-down broadcast + Mistbound disposition before opening Cycle 8a or any subsequent cycle.

— Lunar Ascending Star / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `e02cdd` (Director seat released)
